qa_pairs.question: How are the A100-1g.5gb and H100-1g.10gb GPU instances categorized by their fraction of a whole GPU and their Reference GPU Unit (RGU) values?
qa_pairs.answer: The A100-1g.5gb instance represents 14% of a whole GPU with an RGU value of 0.6, while the H100-1g.10gb instance also represents 14% of a whole GPU but has an RGU value of 1.7.

qa_pairs.question: What are the Reference GPU Unit (RGU) values for the A100-2g.10gb and H100-2g.20gb GPU instances, and what fraction of a whole GPU do they represent?
qa_pairs.answer: Both the A100-2g.10gb and H100-2g.20gb GPU instances represent 28% of a whole GPU. The A100-2g.10gb has an RGU value of 1.1, and the H100-2g.20gb has an RGU value of 3.5.
